calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MALAE FAATEIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

Robert Cohen (no information given) specially appearing for plaintiff and responding party

No other appearances on this matter. Mr. Cohen represented that plaintiff intends to dismiss the case notwithstanding the tentative ruling that sustained the demurrer without leave to amend, no opposition having been filed. Pursuant to the representation, the Court dismissed the case. Plaintiff to file a Request for Dismissal on the mandatory Judicial Council form. (301/AJR) Judge A. James Robertson II, Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620
